examples: Many tycoons live in the wealthy ghetto of Rublyovskoye Shosse, near Putin's dacha on the edge of Moscow.
What was it that lifted him to power, and to the dacha in Novo-Ogarevo?
As Putin tells us at the dacha, as a member of the losing team, he was suddenly untouchable.
My grandmother moved through the dacha kitchen with the grace of a prima ballerina.
Then last summer, he and five other men worked for three months building a dacha.
